summary: 讨论了项目优先级和后续行动。

utterances.speaker: Speaker 1
utterances.text: 我们先把这周最关键的需求收敛下来，然后安排下个迭代。

utterances.speaker: Speaker 2
utterances.text: 可以，我来整理一下优先级和负责人，今天晚上同步到文档里。

understanding.scenarioPrompt: Transcribe the meeting audio into a scenario-aware transcript. Preserve speaker turns, normalize company or project terminology when the context is clear, and prefer action-relevant phrasing over filler speech.
